title: Command Archive Shelf
summary: Bounded the Command deck's lower relay, dispatch, quest, crew, thread, bot-command, and roster boards into compact internal archive viewports so deep material stays reachable without forcing one long page scroll.

stageModel.desktopBehavior: All lower Command support boards after the main workspace are capped at 282px with internal scrolling and a bottom fade, reducing the rendered Command page height from about 9881px to about 3098px.
stageModel.mobileBehavior: The same shelf cap applies on mobile while the deck dock stays horizontally scrollable and the active lane detail still has no internal overflow.
stageModel.motionBehavior: A subtle archive glow on each shelf edge indicates deeper material without adding another animated panel.

verification: In-app browser QA on command deck Chronicle route at 1440x900 and 390x844
